title: Scale Changer
description: A simple mod with a //scale command to change your scale this mod is fully client side and only requires op on a server
body:
A simple mod that adds a single **//scale** command it changes the players scale it works on any server and even single player _**all you need is op to run the command**_
```
//scale <playername> <scale>
```
It works from value 0.01 to 15
